info.title: You must install or update .NET to run this application.
info.description:
App: <path>
Architecture: x64
Framework: 'Microsoft.NETCore.App', version '2.1.0' (x64)
.NET location: /usr/share/dotnet

commands.name: disk
commands.description: Moves a project on disk from one physical location to another. See https://github.com/antoinne85/DotNetMove for more details and example usages.

options.name: --destination
options.description: The path on disk that the project should be moved to.

options.name: --project
options.description: The path to the folder or .csproj file for a project.

options.name: --find-solutions
options.description: Toggles solution search, which will locate solution files referencing the moved project and update them.

options.name: --solution
options.description: The path to the solution file that should be updated as part of the move.

commands.name: solution
commands.description: Moves a project into a solution folder. See https://github.com/antoinne85/DotNetMove for more details and example usages.

options.name: --destination
options.description: The solution folder in which to place the project.

options.name: --project
options.description: The name of the project to move.

options.name: --find-solutions
options.description: Toggles solution search, which will locate solution files referencing the moved project and update them.

options.name: --solution
options.description: The path to the solution file that should be updated as part of the move.
